summary_en: 750,000 shares (5.03% of S/O), ¥285M upper limit, open-market execution on TSE, Jun 1 2026 – Mar 23 2027, to enhance shareholder returns and capital efficiency.
title_en: Notice of Decision Regarding Treasury Stock Acquisition
translation_en_brief: Charle Co., Ltd. announced on May 14, 2026 that its board of directors has authorized a treasury stock acquisition program under the Companies Act. The company will acquire up to 750,000 ordinary shares (representing 5.03% of issued shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥285,000,000. Purchases will be executed via open-market transactions on the Tokyo Stock Exchange from June 1, 2026 through March 23, 2027. The stated rationale is to enhance shareholder returns, improve capital efficiency, and enable flexible capital allocation in response to changing business conditions.
